caption: A woman with light brown hair styled in an updo and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a recording studio. She is positioned in profile, looking toward the left of the frame, with a professional microphone positioned in front of her. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text, and a wall behind her features a yellow vertical stripe. Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST," along with a small emblem. The woman remains mostly still across the sequence, with very slight shifts in her facial expression and posture. The lighting and composition remain constant, creating a static scene where the only movement is the natural, subtle shifting of the woman as she listens or prepares to speak.
